choose.when: 다이어리 <--> SELECT DIARY_ID AS CONTENT_ID, DIARY_NAME AS CONTENT_NAME FROM HOMPI_DIARY WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
사진첩 <--> SELECT ALBUM_ID AS CONTENT_ID, ALBUM_NAME AS CONTENT_NAME FROM HOMPI_ALBUM WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
게시판 <--> SELECT BOARD_ID AS CONTENT_ID, HOMPI_BOARD_TITLE AS CONTENT_NAME FROM HOMPI_BOARD WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
